channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Rubbish Bags, 19th July
item.description:
Rubbish Bags

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tremaine Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped matress, 19th July
item.description:
Mattress on pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Avenue Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, 19th July
item.description:
Several weeks of overflowing bins from house 53, blocking the pedestrian path and spreading rubbish in the street. They need to be moved if belong to the tenants of building 53 and rubbish removed from the street as it is attracting rats.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crystal Palace Park Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lights rotated, 19th July
item.description:
Lights rotated

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 372, Kingsland Road, Dalston, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Damage - pole leaning / equipment detached from pole/facing the wrong direction

item.title: Full bin, 19th July
item.description:
Full bin

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 166, Days Lane, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Waste dumped on street and garden waste bin full of rubbish, 19th July
item.description:
On the corner of Mount Pleasant Hill/Mount Pleasant Lane adjacent to number 69, there is a large amount of dumped waste, including wood and panels. A garden waste bin has been left there snd is overflowing eith general waste.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mount Pleasant Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on road, 19th July
item.description:
Yet more fly tipping. On both sides of the west end of Fendyke Road. This is happening weekly. It needs active enforcement/ cameras.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fendyke Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip, 19th July
item.description:
Fly tipping again when will something be done about this
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mayplace Avenue, Barnes Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass in the playground, 19th July
item.description:
There is shattered / broken glass in the playground at Willet Recreation. The glass was around the large roundabout and the climbing frame and there was quite a lot of it.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Towncourt Crescent, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Best Turkish Kebab litter, 19th July
item.description:
Persistent littering by Best Turkish Kebab customers.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Walford Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned bins - do not belong to 33 please remove., 19th July
item.description:
Bins left by side of 33 - do not belong to the property. Please remove. I understand Greenwich has a shortage of new wheelie bins - I hope these can be repurposed for other residents which need them.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Devonshire Drive, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Priory park road pavement on the side of ryde house garden, 19th July
item.description:
Lots of rubbish always on that side of the pavement on the edge with ryde house garden. I can’t figure out if it’s residents of the estate throwing rubbish in their gardens

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Priory Park Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped garden chair aside number 31 - please remove, 19th July
item.description:
Flytipped garden chair to the side of number 31 - please remove

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Devonshire Drive, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Burnt Out Vehicle, 19th July
item.description:
This burnt out and abandoned vehicle has been there almost a week. It’s a hazard and attracting more antisocial behaviour.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gladstone Mews, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Corner of priory park Road and st Julian Road, 19th July
item.description:
Black woman resident of oriel house dumped something that looks like cupboard doors, when I challenged she said she had booked a collection but she didn’t leave a note with her stuff and also dropped the stuff earlier on Sunday am.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Priory Park Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Not enough bins and fly tipping, 19th July
item.description:
Hmos

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brewery Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped by garages and alleyway in Vanessa Close, 19th July
item.description:
Rubbish has been there for many months.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Erith Road, Lessness Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Table, bedding and white goods dumped, 19th July
item.description:
Another set of rubbish has been illegally dumped at the entrance of Coy Terrace. When will measures actively be taken to avoid this hot spot building up?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 185, Gordon Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa dumped between two estates. Drugs users have been staying there and lots of children are around., 19th July
item.description:
Drugs users have been staying there and lots of children are around.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Whiston Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter everywhere at Bloomfield Road - Herbert Road junction., 19th July
item.description:
All round the Londis there’s litter too. So many locals have so little respect, it’s a disgrace round there. Photos taken 19th July 2026.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plumstead Common Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet
